tweets.aiAnalysis: This tweet underperformed due to its defensive, clarification-focused positioning and lack of emotional resonance—it reads as damage control rather than exciting news, and the truncated/incomplete final sentence creates confusion rather than intrigue, dampening both urgency and shareability among holders concerned about redemption mechanics.
